index.headline:
Simple enough.
That's the point.
index.subheadline:
For anyone tired of complex task apps.
Simple enough for everyone, right from the start.
Share with others when you need to.

simple.title: Just what you need
simple.description: Add tasks. Check them off. That's it. No tutorial, no manual needed. Anyone can start right away — no matter their experience with technology.

multidevice.title: Any device, anytime
multidevice.description: Access from any browser, or use the iOS and Android apps. Your lists stay in sync across all devices in real time.

share.title: Share when you want to
share.description: Generate a share code and invite anyone to your list in seconds. No account required to join. Out of the way when you don't need it.

cta.title: Simple enough. That's the point.
cta.description: If task management feels like too much, Lightlist is for you. Start with one list.

sharecode.addToOrderError: Failed to add this task list
